name: emailbaby
description: Build production-ready emailers in Figma for Carisma Wellness brands. v5.1 isolated-brand pipeline with granular QC gates, image bank discovery, semantic image matching, resolution verification, AI image generation (Nano Banana), icon generation with numbered fallback, decorative variety scoring, overlap detection, external QC prompt artifacts, and optional Figma-to-HTML export.
author: Carisma
allowed-tools: Bash, Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, Task, ToolSearch

brand.description: Which Carisma brand to build for

resume.description: If true, read the existing FIGMA-FINISH-PROMPT.md and continue from where we left off instead of starting fresh; legacy completed state files without QC gates enter retrofit QC mode

production_frame.description: Completed Figma production frame with node map, copy manifest, QC gate results, external QC artifacts, and optional HTML export

state_file.description: Path to FIGMA-FINISH-PROMPT.md for session continuity
